messages.content:
Dear CC

This is Pawan Lohia from Kolkata. I made the mistake of buying a philips home theater system in feb 2013. It has been out of order for last 3 months and repeated complaints have given no results as you have one of the worlds worst customer service. The complaint no given above was made on Fri 6 Dec and I had informed yr executive that last 2 complaints have gone waste. Like all useless customer care who talk well but do nothing he told me that it will be take care of on priority but nothing has happened. I called up yr call centre again today and they said the executive had called but I did not respond (which is false as no one had called). They have given me this mail ID I am still writing to you though I have least hope getting any support here as well.

If someone is sitting there who cares a bit about customers I would urge that person to please attend to my complaint and also pls remove the agency whose services you are availing in Kolkata. By the way I am going to raise this thru the social media (twitter and facebook) so that people do not end up frustrated the way I have.

Regards

Pawan Lohia
9903800354.
